prompt: Create a dark fantasy full-body portrait of a gothic fallen angel queen standing in a smoky burned forest at night, centered in the frame. She has enormous ragged black feathered wings spread behind her, very long straight jet black hair, and a mysterious featureless shadowed face hidden beneath an ornate antlered crown made of blackened metal, crystal spikes, tiny skulls, and bone-like horns. Her outfit is an elaborate blood red and black ceremonial gown with layered shredded fabric, leather-like panels, thorny armor, ribbed bodice details, long clawed gloves, dangling chains, ruby accents, skull ornaments, and many clear crystal pendants. She holds a tall necromancer staff in her left hand: a dark twisted pole topped with a crescent-shaped metal frame, a translucent crystal skull, a pointed crystal finial, hanging chains, feathers, and dangling crystal shards. Add a large crystal skull pendant at her waist and scattered crystal skulls and quartz clusters on the charred ground around her. The environment is a dense dead forest with tall black tree trunks, drifting fog, ash, tiny red embers, faint fires in the distance, wet black soil, and dramatic cold moonlit haze from the upper right. Use an ultra-detailed cinematic photoreal fantasy style, high contrast, intricate gothic jewelry, sharp textures, volumetric light rays, moody desaturated blacks and grays with glowing crimson highlights, vertical composition, imposing regal pose, ominous supernatural atmosphere.
